title: Dennis Ritchie
body: Dennis MacAlistair Ritchie (September 9, 1941 – c. October 12, 2011) was an American computer scientist. He created, together with long-time colleague Ken Thompson, the Unix operating system, C programming language, and B programming language.
categories: Harvard John A. Paulson School of Engineering and Applied Sciences alumni
